vocab.meaning: ưu tiên tính hữu dụng hơn vẻ đẹp bên ngoài
vocab.example: In recent years, many people have started to prioritize functionality over aesthetics, opting for supportive sneakers rather than stiff dress shoes.

vocab.meaning: những người có ý thức cao về thời trang
vocab.example: Fashion-conscious individuals are often willing to endure a bit of discomfort if it means staying on trend.

vocab.meaning: cân bằng giữa hai yếu tố
vocab.example: Modern shoemakers are constantly trying to strike a balance between stylish designs and ergonomic support.

vocab.meaning: đánh đổi bằng sự thoải mái
vocab.example: Some youngsters choose trendy footwear at the expense of comfort, which can lead to foot problems later on.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế tối ưu cho sức khỏe và sự tiện dụng
vocab.example: Shoes with an ergonomic design are becoming increasingly popular among office workers who spend all day on their feet.

vocab.meaning: bắt mắt, thu hút về mặt thị giác
vocab.example: While a pair of shoes might be visually appealing on the shelf, the true test is how they feel after an hour of walking.

vocab.meaning: một biểu tượng của địa vị
vocab.example: For some, luxury branded shoes serve as a status symbol, regardless of how impractical they might be for daily use.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ phổ biến, đang là mốt
vocab.example: Athleisure footwear is currently all the rage because it perfectly combines high fashion with extreme comfort.

vocab.meaning: chịu khổ vì thời trang (chấp nhận đau để mặc đẹp)
vocab.example: Many celebrities are willing to suffer for fashion by wearing towering high heels during long red-carpet events.

vocab.meaning: giày dép đa năng (phù hợp nhiều hoàn cảnh)
vocab.example: Most consumers prefer versatile footwear that looks sophisticated enough for work but remains comfortable for a commute.
